message:
test(tui): add header tab hit-test, mode switching, and breakpoint assertions

Add assertions for tab-main/tab-board hit zones in debug view. Update
narrow header test to expect numbered tab prefix ("1 Main"). Add
medium/wide header assertions for board/insights/labels/flow tabs.
Add snapshot_narrow_header_keeps_active_non_primary_mode_visible test
for Sprint mode. Add mouse_left_click_on_header_mode_tab_switches_mode
test verifying click-to-switch on Graph tab produces correct mode,
focus, and status message.

Update beads history snapshots (rotate old 20260316 entries to
20260322 timestamps).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
